subject: [PATCH 1/4] arm64: request contpte-sized folios for exec memory

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch looks good, but there's a minor issue with the commit message. The link to the original patch is not properly formatted.

2026-03-10.patch_summary: The patch modifies the exec_folio_order() function to request contpte-sized folios for executable memory on arm64 architectures, optimizing iTLB entry usage and reducing TLB waste.
